findings: Live counts come from queue/claimed/results file counts, not agent heartbeats.
Agent live/dead status inferred from tmux pane_current_command; sleep treated as done, risking misreport.
Orphan recovery requeues claimed tasks if tmux list empty, risking false recovery.
Nested pulse uses swarm-state.json aggregates only; no per-child telemetry.
Monitor mutates state (requeues orphans, writes runtime-stats.json).
